ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_no" TEXT /* Subject number associated with the course */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "ltp" TEXT /* Lecture-Tutorial-Practice hours */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Total credits assigned to the course */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., CORE, Elective) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student in the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for this course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL of the course syllabus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed to enroll in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment in the university */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Student's minor */,
  "expected_graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the student expects to graduate */,
  "academic_standing" TEXT /* Current academic standing of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester during which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Enrolled, Waitlisted, Dropped) */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the course */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time of enrollment */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the grade */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date and time the grade was assigned */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who assigned the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the semester */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the semester is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department's inquiries */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Instructor teaching the course */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room where the course is offered */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course (e.g., MWF 9:00-10:15) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the course offering */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the offering */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students on the waitlist */,
  "waitlisted_students" INTEGER /* Number of students currently on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academics" (
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the record */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "completed_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits completed by the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits required for degree completion */,
  "semester_gpa" REAL /* GPA for the current semester */,
  "cumulative_credits" INTEGER /* Total cumulative credits completed by the student */,
  "remaining_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits remaining for degree completion */,
  "academic_advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academics_academic_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_advisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to perform the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., login, grade update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
